label: Latent world models & predictive dynamics

node.label: Latent world models & predictive dynamics
node.definition: A compact predictive model of environment dynamics supports imagination, planning, and control.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Latent world models & predictive dynamics is to connect Model-based reinforcement learning, Latent variables & hidden state to downstream capabilities including Model-predictive control, World-model rollout & imagination, Game-playing, control & simulation agents.
examples: substrate for Game-playing, control & simulation agents
limitations: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Model-based reinforcement learning, Latent variables & hidden state.

dependencies.rationale: Latent world models & predictive dynamics follows the learning setup expressed by Model-based reinforcement learning.
Latent world models & predictive dynamics consumes, emits, or organizes information using Latent variables & hidden state.
Latent world models & predictive dynamics is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component State-space transitions.
Latent world models & predictive dynamics follows the learning setup expressed by Generative modeling.

sentence_units.text: A compact predictive model of environment dynamics supports imagination, planning, and control.

The role of Latent world models & predictive dynamics is to connect Model-based reinforcement learning, Latent variables & hidden state to downstream capabilities including Model-predictive control, World-model rollout & imagination, Game-playing, control & simulation agents.
substrate for Game-playing, control & simulation agents
